# Debian

1. Mettre à jour le système d'exploitation : sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade

2. Installer curl : sudo apt install curl

3. Installer Git : https://git-scm.com/install/linux
 
4. Installer PHP et Composer via la CLI de Laravel : https://laravel.com/docs/13.x/installation

5. Installer NodeJS : https://nodejs.org/en/download

6. Installer MariaDB : https://www.digitalocean.com/community/tutorials/how-to-install-mariadb-on-debian-11

7. Installer VSCode
